matches.lb: Midrash: Mekhilta DeRabbi Shimon Ben Yochai 14:6
matches.x: And Egypt shall know that I am the Lord. Previously, they did not know the Lord; now, "And Egypt shall know that I am the Lord." And they did so, to make known the praise of Israel, for they did not say to Moses, "How can we go back and not break the hearts of the children who are with us?" but they believed and went after Moses. Another explanation of "And they did so": They said, willing or…
